calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition By Purchaseer Of Personal Property For Specific Performance Of Executory Contract Of Sale Of Personal Property.
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Shafai appeared by telephone for Stone Street Services, Inc.

The Court stated that it was not sure why this petition is in Probate, that it is a dispute between the Client and the Insurance Company, that it is not a proper probate petition and that Probate Court does not have jurisdiction. The Petition By Purchaser of Personal Property for Specific Performance of Executory Contract of Sale of Personal Property was dismissed without prejudice to Counsel filing an appropriate action.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
